sections.paragraph:
φθοριμαῖος, α, ον (also Eus.) destructive οἵτινες τήν τινων πίστιν ἀνατρέπουσιν φθοριμαίοις λόγοις who upset the faith of some through destructive statements AcPl Cor 1:2 (cp. 2 Ti 2:18).

Eus. Eus. = Eusebius of Caesarea, various works; IV a.d.—List 5

  1. cp. = compare, freq. in ref. to citation fr. ancient texts

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 1055
